sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1953" key="a)qerolo/gion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀθερολόγιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n1953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument for extracting splinters</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> (?) ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:11:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.11.30</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐθειρολόγος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
